faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Click on a question to read the answer.

items.q: How does the service work exactly?
items.a: Simple: choose your preferred layout, send us your materials (names, dates, photos, texts) and we customise everything — colours, fonts, content. Within 48 hours you receive your invitation link ready to share.

items.q: What do I need to send you to get started?
items.a: Just a message with: the couple's names, wedding date and venue, texts you'd like to include and, if you have them, a few photos. We'll guide you through the rest step by step.

items.q: Do guests need to install an app?
items.a: No! The link opens directly in any device's browser. No registration, no download. Just tap the link or scan the QR code.

items.q: Can I request changes after delivery?
items.a: Of course. Every package includes revisions to update texts, dates and content. Changes are reflected in real time without needing to re-share the link.

items.q: How does the RSVP system work?
items.a: Guests open the link and fill in the form with their party size and dietary preferences. You see everything in real time on the dashboard and receive a notification for every response.

items.q: How long does it take to get the invitation?
items.a: Usually 24–48 hours from when you send your materials. We don't publish anything without your final approval, so you're always in control.
